item.title: Don't forget.
item.description: American friends, Canadians will never hate YOU. But we will hate your leader. We will hate your politics. We will hate your policies. Generally, we love our way of life and we love being your neighbour, but we have NO intention to ever be the "51st state". When this is all said and done, and that Candied Yam that you have running your country finally rots, you'll still be invited to the block party. And we will work it out over beers and poutine.
item.dc:creator: ohgodthehorror

item.title: Chatty kitties part 16 ᓚᘏᗢ
item.description:
Welcome to part 16 of infinkitty. Check your Wi-Fi and your pockets … did you forget your keys again?!
Super quiet (and super cute) kitty snores, courtesy of @Mycatisbetterthanyourcat03
"Feed us!!"
Reminds me of The Neverending Story for some reason …
Tiny kitty with big opinions fights five-tentacled creature from the sky
Translation: "SHUT. THE. HECK. UP!!"
am fearce!!!! going to eat you!!!!
When you use up all the leftover “build a kitty“ parts
You're not you when you're hungry
English cocker lamp tax. ~ Part 1 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-2H36dD7 Part 2 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-2-At4BDLA Part 3 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-3-1kWpow7 Part 4 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-4-CelEHoq Part 5 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-5-ZaTUgym Part 6 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-6-iTGAyBs Part 7 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-7-OtLSfZK Part 8 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-8-B9QnwnD Part 9 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-9-5ctDpZm Part 10 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-10-tT7WhM8 Part 11 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-11-popEHkF Part 12 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-12-yDJWYyi Part 13 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-13-QLJTm7q Part 14 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-14-V6X1qZo Part 15 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-15-abPq07r

item.title: He's a fun drunk, though.
item.description: He's still got a box of beer left, but he said he'd try not to buy more after it's out. If he doesn't quit, I won't be upset. I'm happy he's going to give it a try, though. Edit: He usually just drinks three beers in the evenings. When he gets drunk, it's not very often at all. I don't think he has a huge drinking problem. I used to, though! I quit because I'd black out almost every time.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: 16th Fave
item.description: Still drinking too much, even with heart issues. I have cut back but I find it hard to quit. THis sculpture speaks to me on a deep fucking level.

item.title: Hoist the sails, Man the Cannons(or woman them) We're Pilfering more Trans Memes!
item.description:
Evening to all my girlies, Boyo's and Beans, I'm back with another dump of Memes for Trans Femme, Trans Masc and Non descript entities as well as some general shenanigans and transphobe mocking. Freshly stolen from the high seas. While I try to be inclusive, please keep in mind that some of these may reflect my own experience as Trans Femme and is not intended to invalidate other's experiences.
I kind of want to go and remove that watermark...
I am neither of these and I am sad.
(And one carbon)
Not a meme, just felt like showing off my new necklace :3
When a new transmasc gains awareness
:D
Hope I get that someday
Somone in the comments of the previous pic added this third option
this one was marked "Average interaction between transfem and transmasc" :3
Or shapelier :(
Anyone want to help me with a heist?
40+ years of trying to be a guy and hating every second of it.
I've already failed and there's a cat eared hoodie coming March 5-18...
Hrmmmmmmmm... HRMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMM...
Since both were posted.
Don't bitch at me for the spelling, I don't make the memes I just steal them at cannonpoint.
can confirm, I was very much a fucking donkey.
For the Boi's out there who need some.
Goes for trans mascs and cis dudes too.
This concludes this round of meme pilfering. Raids will continue until head pats and snacks are aquired.
item.dc:creator: MelodyLightfoot

item.title: DO Not F with this guy

item.title: I'm so happy she likes it now.
item.description: Miss Tybalt, the fluffiest of fluffs.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: Sweet of her to think of her mailman ....
item.description:
... and vice versa ....
Emotional damage but in a good way. There are so many people you interact with in your daily life that have an impact on you, no matter how small. After seeing this, I started thinking about all the people I interact with directly or indirectly. Such as : The paperboy (indirectly)- I always leave him a big Xmas tip The grocery cart guy at the supermarket I shop at. Always so pleasant. My bank teller. My son's teachers. The cashiers at Burger King (we love to go there and it is always the same cashiers) My barber .... she cuts both my son''s and my hair as we always go together. And so on and so on ... So I understand her response to the mailman's note. I bet he got teary when he received her note as well. Be kind to one another folks.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

.
